content: Self-Refine's iterative un-supervised refinement framework can be re-framed as a structural skeleton for building multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, by leveraging its no-training, no-supervision core constraint to aggregate inconsistent solving perspectives without additional labeled data. This creates a modular self-reflection system that lets a single base LLM generate divergent problem-solving views and iteratively refine them into a more robust output, without extra model training.
